title: Trimble Dimensions to Kick Off with a High-Performance Keynote Speaker
text: Trimble to Provide Insights into Data, Innovation and Technology Conference Experience to Showcase Construction Startup Competition  WESTMINSTER, Colo. , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the keynote speaker for its 2023 Trimble Dimensions Conference—Formula 1's Mark Gallagher.

title: Why These 2 Growth Stocks Are Screaming Buys Right Now
text: Revenue and earnings don't always tell investors what they need to know about a company. That's true right now for PTC and Trimble, which are set to improve cash flow dramatically.

title: Trimble Launches New Cloud-Based Version of its Log Inventory and Management System for Forestry
text: New Trimble LIMS PRO Gives Small- and Medium-Sized Companies the Opportunity to Realize Productivity and Growth Gains WESTMINSTER, Colo. , July 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced the launch of LIMS PRO, a new cloud-hosted version of its widely used Log Inventory and Management System (LIMS) to manage sawmill raw material procurement.

title: 3 Top Stocks Set to Profit From the Construction Spending Boom
text: The strength in U.S. non-residential construction suggests all of this heavy equipment company's end markets could enter growth mode this year. This technology company's solutions help improve productivity and reduce waste in the construction industry.

title: Trimble Has Substantial Upside Potential Despite Flat Growth
text: Trimble is transitioning from a hardware/software solution to a subscription-based software platform, which is expected to widen margins and boost bottom-line growth. The recent acquisition of Transporeon is anticipated to add value to Trimble's software vertical for transportation services, contributing $135mm in incremental revenue over the next three quarters. Using historical multiples, I expect TRMB's shares to trade at $83.28/share for a market cap of $20,000mm, leading to a buy rating for the company.
